programs.title: Dateline: The Smoking Gun
programs.desc: Days after Lauren Giddings vanished, her body was discovered steps from her apartment; to catch her killer, detectives had to untangle a confusing web of clues and find a piece of evidence no one was supposed to see.

programs.title: Dateline: The Smoking Gun
programs.desc: A dad is murdered in his garage; evidence at the crime scene leaves a puzzle for police; a neighbor's camera reveals a clue that investigators hope was key to solving the mystery.

programs.title: Dateline: The Smoking Gun
programs.desc: A man shoots and kills two teenagers breaking into his home; he says that he acted in self-defense; the investigation uncovers a piece of evidence that tells a different story.

programs.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programs.desc: A talented, young art student is murdered; the killer left no fingerprints and no DNA; police zero in on three fellow students and, soon, the dark portrait of a killer began to emerge.

programs.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programs.desc: In Wisconsin, Steven Avery and his nephew, Brendan Dassey, are convicted of killing Teresa Halbach in a case that defies easy answers.

programs.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programs.desc: Fitness executive Nicole Pietz is married to the man of her dreams, then she goes missing after failing to show up for dinner with her husband and friends.
